title: The Briefing: Financial Services
summary: Anthropic hosted a briefing event where leaders from major banks discussed their deployments of Claude across their organizations. The event showcased real-world applications of Claude in the financial services sector.
writeup: This video documents a briefing event hosted by Anthropic in which leaders from major banks describe how they have deployed Claude across their organizations. It covers real-world applications of the model within the financial services sector. The takeaway is a set of firsthand accounts from financial institutions on putting Claude into production.
